description: Manual editorial settings for ranking news candidates before Telegram review.
selection_goal: Prioritize institutionally relevant US market stories with broad impact across equities, bonds, sectors, rates, commodities, FX, flows, options and earnings.
editorial_rules: Do not pick AI, semiconductors or NVDA unless the story is one of the strongest confirmed market drivers of the day.
Prefer stories that move more than one asset class, sector or major market narrative.
Prefer macro, rates, flows, earnings guidance, sector repricing, credit stress and large M&A over isolated ticker noise.
If a story is only a technical quote move, it needs unusual magnitude or sector relevance.
Rumors are allowed only when clearly marked and should rank below confirmed data.
